title: bot: BotCommand::Quit calls process::exit(0), skips Disconnected event and cleanup
description: bot/src/main.rs:242 — handle_command for Quit calls std::process::exit(0). This skips the BotEvent::disconnected("shutdown").emit() at line 137, so consumers reading NDJSON never see a Disconnected event. SQLite connections are dropped without flush. Fix: set a quit flag or send a oneshot signal so the select! loop exits normally and emits the shutdown event.
